data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy. Canvas is exactly a 2x2 layout with 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background #FF00FF only, no texture, no gradient, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text.

Subject: cute Q-version melee enemy for Samsara Ascension, a chibi corrupted xianxia raider. Big head, small body, dark red armor, tiny blade kept close, mischievous hostile expression, rounded but readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Preserve exact identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes, costume/armor marks, weapon, and material language across all frames.

Action: walk cycle with real pose changes. Frame 1 (top-left): first stride, front limb/leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction. Frame 2 (top-right): passing step, body rises slightly, rear limb/trailing side catches up, cloth or petals trail backward. Frame 3 (bottom-left): opposite stride, other limb/side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. Frame 4 (bottom-right): passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop reads as movement. Use stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded. Same body height and same pixel scale in every frame. Full body visible in each cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, subject fills about 60 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin.

Containment: entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy game sprite, crisp readable silhouette, cute but hostile, coherent animation sheet.
